structurePatterns: Linear track = 4px height, full width, tier3-line color (#E7E7E7)
Linear fill = accent blue (#336EE8) — only 4px high subtle indication
Circular track = tier3-line, fill = accent blue
Determinate shows % via CSS animation width/stroke-dashoffset
usageHints: Blue fill is acceptable here as a progress signal — thin and subtle
Linear for page/content loading, circular for inline actions
No text label within the progress — use caption below if needed
doNotInvent: Large thick progress bars — 4px max for linear
Overlay spinners — use linear at top of content area
